criteria.name: intact graph is motif-diverse
criteria.note: Each intact task/regime aggregate must contain seeded FF, LAT, and FB motif edges.

criteria.name: motif ablations produce predicted losses
criteria.note: Loss can be accuracy, correlation, recovery, or active-population efficiency versus intact motif CRA.

criteria.name: random/monolithic controls do not dominate intact

result.failure_reason: Failed criteria: random/monolithic controls do not dominate intact
result.name: circuit_motif_causality

summary.claim_boundary: Software-only motif-causality suite; seeded motif graph, not hardware or on-chip evidence.
